object.original.name: Red Bull Original

config.debug-logging.name: Debug Logging
config.debug-logging.tooltip: Log routine asset, shop, and vending-machine diagnostics. Errors are always logged.
config.easy-mode.name: Easy Mode
config.easy-mode.tooltip: When enabled: (1) the vending machine is sold at Robin's Carpentry Shop, and (2) all Star Bull editions are sold at Pierre's and JojaMart.
